title: Add rel=0 Parameter to All YouTube Embeds
description:
Append the `rel=0` parameter to all YouTube embed URLs throughout DataTools Pro. This ensures that only DataTools Pro videos are shown in the related videos section at the end of playback, preventing competitor or unrelated content from appearing.

## Scope
- Splash screen welcome video
- YouTube help videos
- Any other YouTube embeds in the application
acceptance_criteria: All YouTube embed URLs include the rel=0 parameter
Related videos at the end of playback only show DataTools Pro channel videos
No YouTube embeds are missing the rel=0 parameter
implementation_notes: Most YouTube embeds already had rel=0. Only the Tableau settings page was missing it. Added and deployed.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed rel=0 was already present everywhere except the Tableau settings page. Fixed and ready for review.
